Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Ford Motor Company's motion for consolidation is off calendar. The motion was heard on March 23, 2010. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR # 8600 =(220/HEK)

Notice Of Motion For Consolidation; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Stephen Grimsrud, Esq. of LANKFORD & CRAWFORD LLP (925-258-9091), appearing for defendant / moving party FORD MOTOR COMPANY
Oren P. Noah, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party JOHN HALL, JR., et al and KEITH HALL et al
Kelli Herzog, Esq. of VASQUEZ ESTRADA & DUMONT LLP (415-453-1555), appearing for defendant HILL BROTHERS CHEMICAL COMPANY
Agnes Dziadur, Esq. of SINUNU BRUNI, LLP (415-362-9700), appearing for defendant BLATT DEVELOPMENT COMPANY
Paul J. Gamba, Esq. of SELMAN BREITMAN (415-979-0400), appearing for defendant PEP BOYS
Valerie R. Marvin, Esq. of IMAI, TADLOCK, KEENEY & CORDLEY, LLP (415-675-7000), appearing for defendant RICH-TEX

RULING:
Defendant Ford Motor Company's motion for consolidation. Argued and tentative ruling adopted. Defendant's motion is granted. Henceforth the two cases will be consolidated for all purposes with 274799 as the lead case. There will be no more filings in 275423. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Maria Lertora Aliventi, CSR # 11935 = (220/HEK)
